name: Bolt.BoltAttributes
summary: The BoltAttributes class is the attributes class for the bolt.

constructors.name: Bolt.BoltAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default bolt attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: Bolt.BoltAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new bolt attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

properties.name: CustomPresentation
properties.summary: Custom presentation GUID to be applied to the bolt

properties.name: Representation
properties.summary: The representation type of the bolt.

properties.name: SymbolContainsAxis
properties.summary: True if the bolt symbol contains an axis.

properties.name: SymbolContainsHole
properties.summary: True if the bolt symbol contains a hole.

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (RGB enabled) of the bolt.
